positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a vibrant cosmic fox spirit (Kitsune), depicted as a silhouette against a gradient nebula background. The fox should have flowing, ethereal tails and glowing bioluminescent markings that trace geometric patterns on its body. The composition must be central, emphasizing the graceful pose and strong, clean outline. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets Japanese woodblock print, utilizing deep indigo, electric cyan, magenta, and gold accents. Lighting: High contrast rim lighting to define the silhouette. Print details: Vector graphic quality, solid color blocks, perfect symmetry, isolated subject on a clean background.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermarks, text, signature, logo, trademark, out of frame, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grain, noise, low detail, messy, clutter
